meta.title: MergeCore Livewire Rules
meta.description: Rules for Livewire v3 components and wire:* views: authorisation, payloads, performance, uploads, and dispatches.
meta.notes: Gate with livewire: true when the host supports project metadata. Rules marked livewire: true are Livewire-specific.

scoring.normalisation: Per review unit (one PHP component class or one Blade file using wire:*), sum penalties for matched rules after optional quality_signal multiplier, then score = max(0, min(10, initial_score - min(sum_penalties, max_total_penalty_per_file))).

livewire_overrides.description: Optional host tuning: multiply penalties for category 'performance' when the Blade file contains several wire:model bindings.

interpretation.9_to_10: Authorised actions, bounded payloads, eager loads, sensible wire:model usage.
interpretation.7_to_8: Shippable; fix a few hot paths or payload leaks.
interpretation.5_to_6: Risky: missing gates, chatty live bindings, or N+1 in views.
interpretation.0_to_4: Block: unauthenticated mutations or unsafe uploads.

rules.title: Livewire action without authorisation
rules.description: Public methods that change persisted state or trigger side effects should call $this->authorize(), use #[Authorize], or an equivalent gate. Relying on hidden buttons is not sufficient.

heuristics: Method name matches save|delete|toggle|approve but no authorisation call in body

rules.title: Whole Eloquent model in a public Livewire property
rules.description: Serialising full models to the client increases payload size and leaks hidden attributes unless carefully configured. Prefer ids with fresh queries, API resources, or small arrays.

heuristics: Property type hints Model or ?User and is assigned from ::find without Arrayable shaping

examples.after: public int $orderId; // resolve Order inside authorised methods or use OrderApiResource

rules.title: Blocking outbound call or mail in a Livewire action
rules.description: Http::timeout(), Mail::send(), and similar work runs on the Livewire request thread and freezes the UI. Dispatch a job or return quickly with a queued follow-up.

heuristics: Inside public component method, not inside dispatch or ShouldQueue class

rules.title: wire:model.live without debounce on chatty inputs
rules.description: Search boxes and textareas with wire:model.live fire a round-trip on every keystroke unless debounced or switched to wire:model.blur.

heuristics: Bound to query or notes fields
Same element is input type search or textarea

rules.title: Dynamic @foreach without wire:key
rules.description: Lists that reorder, filter, or append items need stable wire:key values so Livewire can reconcile DOM nodes correctly.

heuristics: Loop variable is model or array row with id

rules.title: Relation accessed in view without eager load
rules.description: Accessing $model->relation in Blade or a computed while the component query did not with() causes N+1 queries during render.

rules.title: File upload without validation or WithFileUploads
rules.description: Temporary uploads must use Livewire's file helpers, size and mime rules, and storage policies. Missing validation invites oversized or malicious files.

heuristics: Property typed as TemporaryUploadedFile without rules array nearby

rules.title: Livewire dispatch with unbounded or sensitive payload
rules.description: dispatch('$event', ...) to the browser or other components should not send full models, tokens, or large blobs. Send ids and reload server-side.

heuristics: Second argument is entire $this->user or model

rules.title: Strong pattern: eager loading in render or query
rules.description: Explicit with(), load(), or scoped queries in the component show awareness of N+1 and payload size.

heuristics: Inside render() or mount() returning data to the view
